improvements: The Clippy mascot now comes alive on the empty screen
Smoother, safer server updates with no sync interruption
fixes: Clips copied during long offline stretches always sync when you're back
Deleting a clip on one device can no longer bring back a copy someone re-copied later
Clear all now works even right after opening the app offline
Old screenshots no longer jump to the top of history after a reconnect
History shows the same clips on every device after bulk deletes
